examples: People are far more promiscuous, it seems, on foreign holidays.
The results were consistent: when it comes to online news, Britons are shamelessly promiscuous.
Those boys that become young fathers may have inherited noncommittal, promiscuous behaviour from their absent fathers.
Bruno and Michel, his half-brother, are the unloved, 40-ish offspring of a promiscuous mother.
Thriving ecosystems require promiscuous behavior, where people are open to experimentation, risk-taking, and sharing ideas.
